title: Device Home screen - Connection status
scenario: Device Home screen connection status updates correctly between 'Connected' (green) and 'Disconnected' (red) based on headset power state
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is paired and connected to the Android device.
4. Observe the connection status indicator on the Home screen for the paired headset.
5. Turn off the Poly Bluetooth headset (e.g., press and hold the Power button until it powers off).
6. Observe the connection status indicator on the Home screen again.
expected: When the headset is paired and connected, the Home screen displays 'Connected' with a green marker. When the headset is turned off, the status updates to 'Disconnected' with a red marker.
